{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Video Editor / Social Media Assistant",
  "description": "Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor / Social Media Assistant

Job Location: Remote

Summary


	Avocado Virtual Solutions is recruiting for a client and is looking for a creative, trend-aware Video Editor &amp; Social Media Assistant to join the team in a full-time remote role.


Responsibilities


	Edit raw video content from brand shoots into high-performing social media content
	Follow brand guidelines and maintain a consistent visual style
	Stay up to date with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and viral content trends
	Repurpose one piece of content into multiple engaging clips without making them feel repetitive
	Create short-form videos optimized for engagement and conversions
	Design simple short carousel posts for Instagram
	Schedule content across social media platforms
	Write captions and relevant hashtags to support each post
	Assist with maintaining a consistent posting schedule.


Requirements


	Strong experience editing short-form content for TikTok and Instagram Reels
	Good understanding of viral hooks, pacing, transitions, and storytelling
	Ability to work quickly and meet deadlines
	Familiarity with social media scheduling tools
	Creative eye for clean, playful, family-friendly branding
	Ability to independently identify content opportunities and trends
	Strong communication and organisational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;avsabujahr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Applicants must:


	Send links to previous content they have edited
	Include examples of short-form content that performed well.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Video Editor / Social Media Assistant Job at Avocado Virtual Solutions




        
    

        
        Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor / Social Media Assistant

Job Location: Remote

Summary


	Avocado Virtual Solutions is recruiting for a client and is looking for a creative, trend-aware Video Editor & Social Media Assistant to join the team in a full-time remote role.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Edit raw video content from brand shoots into high-performing social media content
	Follow brand guidelines and maintain a consistent visual style
	Stay up to date with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and viral content trends
	Repurpose one piece of content into multiple engaging clips without making them feel repetitive
	Create short-form videos optimized for engagement and conversions
	Design simple short carousel posts for Instagram
	Schedule content across social media platforms
	Write captions and relevant hashtags to support each post
	Assist with maintaining a consistent posting schedule.


Requirements


	Strong experience editing short-form content for TikTok and Instagram Reels
	Good understanding of viral hooks, pacing, transitions, and storytelling
	Ability to work quickly and meet deadlines
	Familiarity with social media scheduling tools
	Creative eye for clean, playful, family-friendly branding
	Ability to independently identify content opportunities and trends
	Strong communication and organisational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Applicants must:


	Send links to previous content they have edited
	Include examples of short-form content that performed well.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Manager",
  "description": "Radisson Hotel Group is one of the world&#39;s largest and most dynamic hotel groups with seven&nbsp;distinctive hotel brands with more than 1,100 hotels in destinations around the world. Our portfolio of hotel brands includes: Radisson Collection, Radisson Blu, Radisson, Radisson RED, Park Plaza, Park Inn by Radisson and Country Inn &amp; Suites by Radisson.

Radisson Hotels&rsquo; highest priority is the health, safety &amp; security of our guests, employees and business partners worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;IT Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Benin City, Edo

Job Description


	As an Information Technology Manager, you bring a cutting-edge blend of innovation, a results-driven approach, and a fervor for advancing technological solutions to our dynamic IT team.
	Your expertise and dedication will play a pivotal role in steering our technology initiatives to new heights.


Responsibilities


	Responsible for overseeing the security, integrity, and maintenance of IT systems, ensuring that systems are well maintained and IT procedures robust.
	Extensive interactions with business counterparts driving business readiness and contingency activities, system installations and liaison with business users for acceptance of deliverables, initiatives, and compliance KPI&rsquo;s.
	Develops and implements IT strategies where objectives are communicated at all levels, the performance of system software and hardware is audited and reported upon to enables strategic business decisions to be made.
	Understands the overall objectives and architectural aspects of all IT systems to ensuring that all IT functions and disciplines are controlled, audited ensuring system efficiencies are attained.
	Participates in the negotiations for installations, service and maintenance agreements of all IT system, project managing the process and ensuring that licensing and upgrades are kept in date.
	Builds and maintains effective working relationships with all key stakeholders.
	Reviews and scrutinizes system performance, in accordance with company policy, providing recommendations that will drive efficiency and provide added value to the business.
	Ensures adherence and compliance to all legislation where due diligence requirements and best practice activities are planned, delivered and documented for internal and external audit, performing follow-up as required.
	Nigerian National applications only.&nbsp;


Qualifications


	Proven experience in IT with strong problem-solving capabilities.
	Excellent leadership skills with a hands-on approach and lead-by-example work style.
	Commitment to exceptional guest service with a passion for the hospitality industry.
	Ability to find creative solutions, offering advice and recommendations.
	Personal integrity, with the ability to work in an environment that demands excellence, time and energy.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Radisson Hotel Group"
    
  },

IT Manager Job at Radisson Hotel Group




        
    

        
        Radisson Hotel Group is one of the world's largest and most dynamic hotel groups with seven distinctive hotel brands with more than 1,100 hotels in destinations around the world. Our portfolio of hotel brands includes: Radisson Collection, Radisson Blu, Radisson, Radisson RED, Park Plaza, Park Inn by Radisson and Country Inn & Suites by Radisson.

Radisson Hotels’ highest priority is the health, safety & security of our guests, employees and business partners worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Manager

Job Location: Benin City, Edo

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As an Information Technology Manager, you bring a cutting-edge blend of innovation, a results-driven approach, and a fervor for advancing technological solutions to our dynamic IT team.
	Your expertise and dedication will play a pivotal role in steering our technology initiatives to new heights.


Responsibilities


	Responsible for overseeing the security, integrity, and maintenance of IT systems, ensuring that systems are well maintained and IT procedures robust.
	Extensive interactions with business counterparts driving business readiness and contingency activities, system installations and liaison with business users for acceptance of deliverables, initiatives, and compliance KPI’s.
	Develops and implements IT strategies where objectives are communicated at all levels, the performance of system software and hardware is audited and reported upon to enables strategic business decisions to be made.
	Understands the overall objectives and architectural aspects of all IT systems to ensuring that all IT functions and disciplines are controlled, audited ensuring system efficiencies are attained.
	Participates in the negotiations for installations, service and maintenance agreements of all IT system, project managing the process and ensuring that licensing and upgrades are kept in date.
	Builds and maintains effective working relationships with all key stakeholders.
	Reviews and scrutinizes system performance, in accordance with company policy, providing recommendations that will drive efficiency and provide added value to the business.
	Ensures adherence and compliance to all legislation where due diligence requirements and best practice activities are planned, delivered and documented for internal and external audit, performing follow-up as required.
	Nigerian National applications only. 


Qualifications


	Proven experience in IT with strong problem-solving capabilities.
	Excellent leadership skills with a hands-on approach and lead-by-example work style.
	Commitment to exceptional guest service with a passion for the hospitality industry.
	Ability to find creative solutions, offering advice and recommendations.
	Personal integrity, with the ability to work in an environment that demands excellence, time and energy.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Clerk

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a reliable and organized Warehouse Keeper to manage the daily activities of the warehouse.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for receiving, storing, recording, and distributing goods while ensuring proper inventory management and cleanliness of the warehouse environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and inspect incoming goods and materials.
	Arrange and store products properly in the warehouse.
	Keep accurate records of stock movement and inventory.
	Monitor stock levels and report shortages or damages.
	Prepare goods for dispatch and delivery.
	Conduct routine stock checks and inventory counting.
	Maintain cleanliness and safety within the warehouse.
	Ensure proper labeling and organization of items.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure smooth operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE qualification.
	Previous warehouse or storekeeping experience is an added advantage.
	Good organizational and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to lift and move goods when necessary.
	Basic knowledge of inventory management.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Must be responsible, punctual, and hardworking.


Salary
N80,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrmarthameweelectronics@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Warehouse Clerk Job at MeWe Electronics




        
    

        
        MeWe Electronics is a foremost Nigerian brand of electronics, the company produces electronic and household appliances for a vast customer base

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Clerk
Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a reliable and organized Warehouse Keeper to manage the daily activities of the warehouse.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for receiving, storing, recording, and distributing goods while ensuring proper inventory management and cleanliness of the warehouse environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and inspect incoming goods and materials.
	Arrange and store products properly in the warehouse.
	Keep accurate records of stock movement and inventory.
	Monitor stock levels and report shortages or damages.
	Prepare goods for dispatch and delivery.
	Conduct routine stock checks and inventory counting.
	Maintain cleanliness and safety within the warehouse.
	Ensure proper labeling and organization of items.
	Work closely with other departments to ensure smooth operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE qualification.
	Previous warehouse or storekeeping experience is an added advantage.
	Good organizational and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to lift and move goods when necessary.
	Basic knowledge of inventory management.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Must be responsible, punctual, and hardworking.


Salary
N80,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquires text; 0906 875 4204 via WhatsApp (No calls please).    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Design Engineer",
  "description": "BASSCOMM is a Mechanical and Electrical Contractor working throughout Nigeria with a reputation for completing projects efficiently, within time and budget constraints and to the highest quality it has made us the Contractor of choice for our industry over the past decade. We currently operate across Nigeria in various sectors throughout the industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Design Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking highly motivated, experienced and result driven Electrical Design Engineer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing technical designs and drawings while also supporting the commercial and bidding aspects of engineering projects in line with the company&#39;s objective.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess B.S.c Degree / HND in Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
	1&ndash;2 years of proven experience in Engineering and Commercial design.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit and other relevant design tools
	Good knowledge in MEP and ELVS solution.
	Good knowledge on costing, budgeting and commercial evaluation.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N3,000,000 - N3,600,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@basscommgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidates will be contacted.",

Electrical Design Engineer Job at Basscomm Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        BASSCOMM is a Mechanical and Electrical Contractor working throughout Nigeria with a reputation for completing projects efficiently, within time and budget constraints and to the highest quality it has made us the Contractor of choice for our industry over the past decade. We currently operate across Nigeria in various sectors throughout the industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Design Engineer
Job Location: Maryland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking highly motivated, experienced and result driven Electrical Design Engineer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing technical designs and drawings while also supporting the commercial and bidding aspects of engineering projects in line with the company's objective.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess B.S.c Degree / HND in Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
	1–2 years of proven experience in Engineering and Commercial design.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit and other relevant design tools
	Good knowledge in MEP and ELVS solution.
	Good knowledge on costing, budgeting and commercial evaluation.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N3,000,000 - N3,600,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
